headline: Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE): A Growth at a Reasonable Price Stock with Strong Earnings Momentum
summary: Expedia (EXPE) offers affordable growth with a P/E of 15.3, well below industry averages. Strong 41% EPS growth and high profitability combine with a reasonable valuation, making it a balanced opportunity in travel.
